name: openforge
description: AI-powered workspace for understanding repositories and contributing to open source.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build --prefix shared && npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --prefix shared && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix shared && npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
